home.hero.title: Clarify your thoughts in serenity
home.hero.description: Serenity Canvas helps you turn scattered ideas into clear direction through a quiet, layered workspace.
auth.description: Sign in with Google or Email/Password to access your workspace.
auth.validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.error.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
auth.notice.emailConfirmation: Registration successful. Please verify your email, then come back to sign in.
migration.title: Local whiteboard data found
migration.description: You have unsynced local content. Please choose how to handle this data.
migration.option.mergeDescription: Create a new cloud board and keep local content and images.
migration.option.discardDescription: Clear local-board and use cloud boards directly.
migration.error.fallback: Local data migration failed. Please try again later.
toolbar.error.uploadFailed: Image upload failed. Please try again.
syncNotice.title: Sync notice
sidebar.deleteDialog.title: Delete board?
export.title: Export as Obsidian format
export.description: Export your board as an Obsidian Canvas compatible .zip file, including .canvas JSON, Markdown files, and image assets.
export.warningResult: Export completed with {{count}} warning(s). See _export_log.txt in the ZIP.
import.title: Import Obsidian format
import.description: Import a .canvas file or a .zip file with images from Obsidian Canvas. Content will be appended to the current board.
import.dropzone: Drop file or click to select
import.error.invalidFormat: Unsupported file format. Please upload a .canvas or .zip file.
canvas.uploadError.title: Image upload failed
canvas.mobileWarning.title: Desktop recommended
canvas.mobileWarning.description: The canvas is designed for desktop use. For the best experience, please switch to a desktop browser.
colorPicker.title: Card color
image.upload.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format. Please upload JPG/PNG/GIF/WEBP.
image.upload.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum source file size is 10MB.
image.upload.fallbackError: Image upload failed. Please try again.
editor.notReady: Editor not ready. Please drag and drop the image again.
editor.error.uploadFailed: Image upload failed. Please try again.
editor.error.insertFailed: Failed to insert image into this text card.
app.migration.fallbackError: Local data migration failed. Please try again later.
tour.step.canvasIntro.title: Welcome to Serenity Canvas
tour.step.canvasIntro.description: This is your infinite canvas. Arrange text and image cards, create connections, and organize your ideas freely.
tour.step.createCard.title: Create a Card
tour.step.createCard.description: Double-click on an empty area of the canvas to create a text card and start capturing your thoughts.
tour.step.selectMode.title: Select Mode
tour.step.selectMode.description: Press V to switch to select mode. Click to select a card, drag to move it.
tour.step.panZoom.title: Pan & Zoom
tour.step.panZoom.description: Hold Space + drag to pan the canvas. Use the scroll wheel to zoom in and out.
tour.step.multiSelect.title: Multi-Select
tour.step.multiSelect.description: Hold Shift + click to select multiple cards, or drag to marquee-select them.
tour.step.connectMode.title: Connect Mode
tour.step.connectMode.description: Press C to switch to connect mode. Drag from a card's anchor point to another card to create a connection.
tour.step.createGroup.title: Create a Group
tour.step.createGroup.description: Select multiple cards, then right-click and choose "Create Group" to organize them together.
tour.step.textEditing.title: Edit Text
tour.step.textEditing.description: Double-click a card to edit its content. Type / to open the slash command menu for quick formatting.
tour.step.undoRedo.title: Undo & Redo
tour.step.undoRedo.description: All actions can be undone. Use keyboard shortcuts to easily step back and forth.
tour.step.tourComplete.title: You're All Set!
tour.step.tourComplete.description: You've learned the basics. Click this button anytime to restart the tour.
